T0079.title: Waybill Data
T0079.definition: In illicit data trading, refers to leaked detailed records from express delivery logistics.
T0079.description: These records contain the recipient's name, phone number, address, and purchased item details, serving as a crucial information source for targeted marketing and fraud within the underground economy. This data is typically leaked by insiders at courier companies or through system vulnerabilities, sold in bulk by data brokers, and used for brushing, telecom fraud, or selling counterfeit goods.
